name: line-plain-then-step
query:
|~| pre-step note
| 42

name: line-plain-mid-pipeline-shapes-result
query:
5 |~| inline note
| add(3)

name: block-plain-then-step
query: |~ block note ~| 42

name: block-plain-eats-trailing-combinator
query: 5 |~ rationale ~| add(3)

name: line-plain-mid-pipeline
query:
5 | mul(2)
|~| this comment is identity
| add(1)

name: block-plain-mid-pipeline
query: 5 | mul(2) |~ identity rationale ~| add(1)

name: line-doc-on-let
query:
|~~| Удваивает число.
| let double = mul(2)
| 5 | double

name: line-doc-retrieve
query:
|~~| Doc text.
| let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: block-doc-on-let
query:
|~~ Multi-line doc
    spanning many lines. ~~|
let foo = 42
| 5 | foo

name: block-doc-retrieve
query:
|~~ Block doc here. ~~|
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: two-line-docs-as-vec
query:
|~~| Doc one.
|~~| Doc two.
| let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: three-line-docs-as-vec
query:
|~~| First.
|~~| Second.
|~~| Third.
| let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs | count

name: mixed-line-and-block-docs
query:
|~~| Line doc.
|~~ Block doc. ~~|
|~~| Another line.
| let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs | count

name: doc-block-preserves-newlines
query:
|~~ line one
line two ~~|
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs | first

name: doc-on-as-binding
query:
42
|~~| Captured value.
| as snapshot
| reify(:snapshot) | /docs

name: snapshot-unwrap-on-projection
query: 42 | as answer | env | /answer

name: snapshot-unwrap-on-identifier
query: 42 | as answer | answer

name: reify-by-name-on-snapshot
query: 42 | as answer | reify(:answer) | /value

name: reify-by-name-snapshot-name
query: 42 | as answer | reify(:answer) | /name

name: reify-by-name-snapshot-kind
query: 42 | as answer | reify(:answer) | /kind

name: doc-survives-shadowing-redeclare
query:
|~~| Old doc.
| let foo = 1
|~~| New doc.
|~~| With second remark.
| let foo = 2
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: comment-step-is-identity-on-pipevalue
query:
[1 2 3]
|~| this comment doesn't change pipeValue
| count
